glosses.hi: घर में शिफ्ट होना; अंदर खींचना
glosses.ro: a se muta (în); a trage înăuntru
glosses.ja: 入居する; 引き込む

translations.en: Tomorrow I finally want to move in.
translations.pt: Amanhã eu finalmente quero me mudar.
translations.he: מחר סוף סוף אני רוצה להיכנס לדירה.
translations.vi: Ngày mai tôi cuối cùng cũng muốn chuyển vào.
translations.ar: غدًا أخيرًا أريد أن أنتقل للسكن.
translations.hi: कल आखिरकार मैं घर में शिफ्ट होना चाहता हूँ।
translations.nb: I morgen vil jeg endelig flytte inn.
translations.id: Besok aku akhirnya ingin pindah masuk.
translations.sv: Imorgon vill jag äntligen flytta in.
translations.ro: Mâine vreau în sfârșit să mă mut.
translations.da: I morgen vil jeg endelig flytte ind.
translations.ja: 明日、やっと入居したいです。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb setting the time frame (here: tomorrow); placed sentence-initially, triggering verb-first (V2) inversion.
Finite modal auxiliary (1st person singular, present) expressing volition; selects the non-finite main verb at clause end.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause following inversion.
Sentence/degree adverb expressing speaker attitude (after a delay); modifies the predicate.
Lexical main verb in infinitive; separable verb with stressed prefix ein-, here unsplit and placed sentence-finally as required by the modal construction.

translations.en: We can move in next week.
translations.fr: On peut emménager la semaine prochaine.
translations.yue: 我哋下星期可以搬入去。
translations.ru: Мы можем въехать на следующей неделе.
translations.pt: Podemos nos mudar na semana que vem.
translations.he: אנחנו יכולים להיכנס לדירה בשבוע הבא.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi có thể chuyển vào tuần tới.
translations.hi: हम अगले हफ्ते घर में शिफ्ट हो सकते हैं।
translations.pl: Możemy wprowadzić się w przyszłym tygodniu.
translations.el: Μπορούμε να μετακομίσουμε την επόμενη εβδομάδα.
translations.nb: Vi kan flytte inn neste uke.
translations.id: Kita bisa pindah masuk minggu depan.
translations.sv: Vi kan flytta in nästa vecka.
translations.ro: Putem să ne mutăm săptămâna viitoare.
translations.da: Vi kan flytte ind i næste uge.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject in canonical preverbal position.
Finite modal auxiliary (1st person plural, present) expressing ability/possibility; governs the non-finite main verb.
Attributive adjective (strong inflection, accusative feminine singular) modifying Woche in a temporal accusative phrase.
Common noun, feminine; head of the temporal accusative NP nächste Woche functioning as an adverbial of time.
Main verb in infinitive; separable verb (ein- + ziehen) realized as a single infinitive at clause end after the modal.

sentences.target: Meine Schwester darf am Montag einziehen.

translations.de: Meine Schwester darf am Montag einziehen.
translations.en: My sister is allowed to move in on Monday.
translations.es: Mi hermana puede mudarse el lunes.
translations.zh-Hans: 我妹妹星期一可以搬进去。
translations.yue: 我妹喺星期一可以搬入去。
translations.ru: Моей сестре можно въехать в понедельник.
translations.pt: Minha irmã pode se mudar na segunda-feira.
translations.vi: Em gái tôi được phép chuyển vào thứ Hai.
translations.ar: مسموح لأختي أن تنتقل يوم الاثنين.
translations.uk: Моя сестра може заселитися в понеділок.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन सोमवार को घर में शिफ्ट हो सकती है।
translations.pl: Moja siostra może wprowadzić się w poniedziałek.
translations.el: Η αδελφή μου μπορεί να μετακομίσει τη Δευτέρα.
translations.nb: Søsteren min får flytte inn på mandag.
translations.id: Adik perempuan saya diizinkan pindah masuk pada hari Senin.
translations.sv: Min syster får flytta in på måndag.
translations.ro: Sora mea are voie să se mute luni.
translations.cs: Moje sestra se může nastěhovat v pondělí.
translations.da: Min søster må flytte ind på mandag.
translations.ja: 妹は月曜日に入居してもいいです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner agreeing with feminine nominative singular head (Schwester); marks possession.
Common noun, feminine; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary (3rd person singular, present) expressing permission; licenses the non-finite main verb.
Contracted preposition (an + dem) governing dative; introduces a temporal PP with a weekday.
Proper noun (weekday), dative singular as object of am; functions as a temporal adjunct.
Main verb in infinitive; separable verb kept unsplit at clause end after the modal.

translations.en: They would like to move in in June.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们希望在六月搬进去。
translations.ru: Они хотели бы въехать в июне.
translations.pt: Eles gostariam de se mudar em junho.
translations.vi: Họ muốn chuyển vào tháng Sáu.
translations.nl: Zij zouden gerne in juni intrekken.
translations.uk: Вони хотіли б заселитися в червні.
translations.hi: वे जून में घर में शिफ्ट होना चाहते हैं।
translations.el: Θα ήθελαν να μετακομίσουν τον Ιούνιο.
translations.nb: De vil gjerne flytte inn i juni.
translations.id: Mereka ingin pindah masuk pada bulan Juni.
translations.sv: De vill gärna flytta in i juni.
translations.ro: Ar vrea să se mute în iunie.
translations.cs: Chtěli by se nastěhovat v červnu.
translations.da: De vil gerne flytte ind i juni.
translations.ja: 彼らは6月に入居したいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person plural nominative; subject of the clause (agrees with plural finite verb).
Finite modal auxiliary (3rd person plural, Konjunktiv II) expressing desire/polite volition; selects the non-finite main verb.
Contracted preposition (in + dem) governing dative; introduces a temporal PP with a month.
Proper noun (month), dative singular as object of im; functions as a temporal adjunct.
Main verb in infinitive; separable verb placed sentence-finally in the modal-plus-infinitive construction.

app_payload.word_ja: 入居する; 引き込む

es: Mi hermana puede mudarse el lunes.
fr: On peut emménager la semaine prochaine.
zh-Hans: 我妹妹星期一可以搬进去。
他们希望在六月搬进去。
yue: 我哋下星期可以搬入去。
我妹喺星期一可以搬入去。
ru: Мы можем въехать на следующей неделе.
Моей сестре можно въехать в понедельник.
Они хотели бы въехать в июне.
pt: Amanhã eu finalmente quero me mudar.
Podemos nos mudar na semana que vem.
Minha irmã pode se mudar na segunda-feira.
Eles gostariam de se mudar em junho.
he: מחר סוף סוף אני רוצה להיכנס לדירה.
אנחנו יכולים להיכנס לדירה בשבוע הבא.
vi: Ngày mai tôi cuối cùng cũng muốn chuyển vào.
Chúng tôi có thể chuyển vào tuần tới.
Em gái tôi được phép chuyển vào thứ Hai.
Họ muốn chuyển vào tháng Sáu.
ar: غدًا أخيرًا أريد أن أنتقل للسكن.
مسموح لأختي أن تنتقل يوم الاثنين.
nl: Zij zouden gerne in juni intrekken.
uk: Моя сестра може заселитися в понеділок.

hi: कल आखिरकार मैं घर में शिफ्ट होना चाहता हूँ।
हम अगले हफ्ते घर में शिफ्ट हो सकते हैं।
मेरी बहन सोमवार को घर में शिफ्ट हो सकती है।
वे जून में घर में शिफ्ट होना चाहते हैं।
pl: Możemy wprowadzić się w przyszłym tygodniu.
Moja siostra może wprowadzić się w poniedziałek.
el: Μπορούμε να μετακομίσουμε την επόμενη εβδομάδα.
Η αδελφή μου μπορεί να μετακομίσει τη Δευτέρα.

nb: I morgen vil jeg endelig flytte inn.
Vi kan flytte inn neste uke.
Søsteren min får flytte inn på mandag.
De vil gjerne flytte inn i juni.
id: Besok aku akhirnya ingin pindah masuk.
Kita bisa pindah masuk minggu depan.
Adik perempuan saya diizinkan pindah masuk pada hari Senin.
Mereka ingin pindah masuk pada bulan Juni.
sv: Imorgon vill jag äntligen flytta in.
Vi kan flytta in nästa vecka.
Min syster får flytta in på måndag.
De vill gärna flytta in i juni.
ro: Mâine vreau în sfârșit să mă mut.
Putem să ne mutăm săptămâna viitoare.
Sora mea are voie să se mute luni.
Ar vrea să se mute în iunie.
cs: Moje sestra se může nastěhovat v pondělí.
Chtěli by se nastěhovat v červnu.
da: I morgen vil jeg endelig flytte ind.
Vi kan flytte ind i næste uge.
Min søster må flytte ind på mandag.
De vil gerne flytte ind i juni.
ja: 明日、やっと入居したいです。
妹は月曜日に入居してもいいです。
彼らは6月に入居したいです。
